response.original_title: Brad Williams: Live on Short Street
response.overview: Brad Williams is back with his fourth stand-up comedy special LIVE ON SHORT STREET!  A fearless, high-energy hour packed with outrageous true stories, brutally honest observations, and nonstop laughs from one of the most electrifying comedians in the world.  Filmed live in front of a sold-out crowd in Lexington, KY, Brad dives into everything from relationships, marriage, and fatherhood to disability, sex, therapy, and the absurd realities of modern life. With razor-sharp punchlines and explosive storytelling, this special proves why Brad continues to sell out theaters around the globe.
response.title: Brad Williams: Live on Short Street
